name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers payday loans, installment loans, title loans, and check cashing at ~700–900 U.S. locations and online, serving unbanked and underbanked consumers.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express was founded in 1968 and is one of the oldest and largest alternative financial services retailers in the United States. Headquartered in Irving, TX, the company operates under parent Populus Financial Group, Inc. (rebranded from ACE Cash Express, Inc. in 2019) and maintains approximately 700–900+ physical store locations nationwide alongside a full online lending and service channel. It is privately held, holds no CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications, and is not affiliated with any nonprofit or credit union structure — it is a for-profit lender and transaction-fee service provider, licensed state by state.

ACE's core products are short-term consumer loans: payday loans (single-payment), installment loans, and title loans, all with no application fee. Specific APRs and fees vary by state law and are published in state-specific fee schedules. Funds can be delivered instantly to an eligible debit card, via next-business-day direct deposit, or as cash at an in-store location. Beyond lending, ACE offers a broad suite of transactional services including check cashing, bill payment, money orders, domestic and international wire transfers, and branded prepaid cards — the ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Debit Card and the ACE Flare Account. Applications and loan management are available online at acecashexpress.com or through the ACE Loans mobile app on iOS and Android.

ACE is the second-largest short-term consumer loan store operator in the U.S. and one of the largest check cashing operators nationally. A meaningful consumer protection is its 72-hour satisfaction guarantee on payday loans: borrowers who change their mind can return the principal within 72 hours and owe zero fees or interest. The ACE Loans app supports loan applications, account management, store location lookup, and refinancing of eligible loans — relatively full-featured for a storefront payday lender. The company holds a BBB A+ rating and is accredited under its Irving, TX headquarters profile.

ACE Cash Express serves a real and underserved segment — consumers without traditional banking access who need immediate cash — but its products are high-cost by design, and the company carries significant regulatory history. The CFPB fined ACE $10 million in 2014 for illegal debt collection tactics and structuring its loan system to push borrowers into repeat cycles of debt. In 2022, the CFPB filed suit against Populus Financial Group alleging over $240 million in improper fees through concealed free repayment plans and unauthorized fund withdrawals — litigation that remained active as of available records. California's DFPI has also taken enforcement action. For consumers with no alternatives, ACE's speed, geographic reach, and satisfaction guarantee provide real short-term utility. Its high costs and enforcement track record make it unsuitable as a recurring financial solution.
address: 3330 N Galloway Ave Ste 275, Mesquite, TX 75150

pricing.guarantee_details: 72-hour satisfaction guarantee on payday loans: return the loan principal within 72 hours of funding and pay no fees or interest.

pros: Founded in 1968 — over 55 years operating in alternative financial services, one of the most established names in the space
72-hour satisfaction guarantee on payday loans: return principal within 72 hours and owe no fees or interest whatsoever
~700–900+ physical store locations nationwide plus full online application and loan management at acecashexpress.com
No application fees for payday loans, installment loans, or title loans
ACE Loans mobile app (iOS/Android) supports loan applications, account management, store lookup, and refinancing
Multiple fund delivery options: instant to eligible debit card, next-business-day direct deposit, or in-store cash pickup
BBB A+ rating and accredited under its Irving, TX headquarters profile
cons: CFPB fined ACE $10 million in 2014 for illegal debt collection tactics and deliberately engineering a cycle of debt among borrowers
CFPB filed suit in 2022 against Populus Financial Group (dba ACE Cash Express) alleging $240M+ in improper fees through concealed repayment plans and unauthorized withdrawals — litigation ongoing
California DFPI has also taken separate enforcement action against the company
Check cashing fees are not published online and vary by state and check type — must visit a store or call to confirm
Payday, installment, and title loans carry high APRs typical of short-term alternative lending — specific rates vary by state and are not disclosed as a single national figure
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who lack traditional bank accounts and need immediate cash access
Individuals facing a short-term cash shortfall between paychecks with no access to traditional credit products
Consumers who want the option to cancel a payday loan within 72 hours at no cost
Lower- to moderate-income individuals needing transactional financial services (check cashing, money orders, bill pay) in a single location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate short-term cash and have no viable alternative — its scale, speed, and 72-hour guarantee are genuine advantages in that context. The main caveat is significant: two CFPB enforcement actions (a $10M fine in 2014 and an active 2022 lawsuit alleging $240M+ in improper fees) reflect a documented history of practices harmful to the very borrowers it serves, and its loan costs are high by definition.
services: Wire transfers and domestic/international money transfers
ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Debit Card
Online loan applications and account management
ACE Loans mobile app (iOS/Android) — apply, manage, and refinance loans
In-store cash pickup for loan proceeds

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
